activities.observation: Preparation performed for water pump piping transition and system integration activities.
Water pump activated and observed delivering water flow into a basin. Continuous discharge verified during operation.
PVC inlet pipe positioned and prepared for water transfer into storage tank WT-F-0001.
Water from pumping system observed flowing into storage tank WT-F-0001. Continuous inflow verified.
Water storage tank WT-F-0001 observed at full operating level following pumping activity.
